title: flaveria campestris
intro: Flaveria campestris, also known as Field Flaveria, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Americas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Flaveria campestris include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Flaveria campestris can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
